hero.subtitle: Create tasks, collaborate with your team, and stay on top of deadlines — all in one clean, intuitive app.

features.subtitle: Built for teams who want to get things done — not spend hours configuring yet another tool.
features.groupTasksDesc: Create groups, invite members, and manage tasks together. Assign tasks, track progress, and keep everyone aligned.
features.remindersDesc: Notifications that actually work. Set custom reminders and never miss a deadline again.
features.templatesDesc: Save time with reusable task templates. Create once, use everywhere — perfect for recurring workflows.
features.calendarDesc: See your tasks on a calendar. Plan your day, week, or month with a clear visual overview.
features.widgetDesc: Quick access to your tasks right from your home screen. Check and complete tasks without opening the app.
features.multilangDesc: Available in Turkish, English, German, Spanish, Arabic, and Chinese. Use Taskative in your language.

pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no surprises.

platforms.title: Taskative,
platforms.subtitle: Your tasks sync in real time across mobile, web, and browser extension. Pick your favorite and get started.
platforms.mobileDesc: Native Android with widgets, reliable reminders, and offline support. Capture on the go, check off from home screen.
platforms.webDesc: Full dashboard in any browser — calendar, timeline, Gantt, reports. No installation required. Just sign in and plan.
platforms.extensionDesc: Right-click any text on any webpage to turn it into a task. Perfect for Gmail, Notion, articles, research.

cta.title: Ready to get organized?
cta.subtitle: Join teams managing their tasks with Taskative. Start free — no credit card required.
cta.webAppSoon: Web app coming soon — manage tasks from your browser
